_comment: Enhancements beyond the frozen 126 (see PROTOCOL.md). Builders capture evidence under harness/evidence/<id>/; only the evaluator agent flips results.json.

enhancements.title: Workflow state_field binds an existing field; inserts forced to initial state; direct saves of the bound field rejected
Email Rules fire on on_create/on_save (incl. workflow transitions), transition-only conditions, templated recipients
Assignment Rules: condition + round-robin pool + assign_to_field stamping
SLAs: per-priority deadline stamping on insert + check_sla Overdue escalation
Logged-in web-form submitters own the created document (if_owner portal loop)
User-permission list narrowing passes NULL links (matches Frappe + the detail check)
sid-cookie sessions, /api/method/login|logout, exc_type errors, frappe.client.* RPC namespace
Standard filter bar, indicator pills, module-grouped sidebar, Cmd-K awesomebar commands
HD Ticket helpdesk built purely from metadata (seed + 32-check verify script)
